violations.text: The non-food contact surfaces of the water tube (ice machine) have an accumulation of soil residue and other debris. PIC instructed employee to clean and sanitize tube during inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 12/15/2025

The walls behind 3 bay sink and prep sink is in poor repair. Observed hole and damaged tiles. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. PIC put in service order to repair walls. New Violation. Correct By: 09/17/2024
